description: Extract daily Duolingo XP into outcomes schema
sql: SELECT date::DATE as date, 'duolingo' as source, xp_gained as daily_duolingo_xp FROM sources.duolingo__daily_xp WHERE xp_gained IS NOT NULL

description: Track whether Duolingo was used today (XP > 0)
sql: SELECT date::DATE as date, 'duolingo' as source, xp_gained > 0 as duolingo FROM sources.duolingo__daily_xp
